home.title: Dumlupınar Primary School - Donation Page
home.subtitle: Let's Invest in the Future Together
home.hero_desc: The students of our school in the heart of Birecik need your support for a better educational environment. Every contribution makes a difference in a child's life.
home.step1_desc: Select the item you want to support from our school's needs list
home.step2_desc: Contribute the full amount, half, or as much as you'd like
home.step3_desc: Copy the IBAN details and send the transfer from your bank
home.loading_error: An error occurred while loading data. Please refresh the page.
home.all_met: All our needs have been met!
home.all_met_desc: Thank you for your support. Keep following our page for new needs.
home.footer_quote: Every donation is an investment in a student's future.
home.footer_desc: Our school in the heart of Birecik awaits your support for a better educational environment.

item.completed_title: This need has been met thanks to our donors!
item.completed_desc: Your support has made our students smile. You can also check out our other needs.
item.not_found: The requested item was not found.

amount.title: How Much Would You Like to Contribute?
amount.full_desc: You will cover the entire need
amount.half_desc: You will support half of the need
amount.student_title: How Many Students Would You Like to Support?
amount.student_info: {{count}} students need support for this item. Unit price: ₺{{price}}
amount.student_custom_desc: How many students will you support?
amount.student_max_error: You can select up to {{max}} students
amount.student_min_error: You must select at least 1 student
amount.student_summary_desc: You will cover the needs of {{count}} students

payment.title: How Would You Like to Send Your Donation?
payment.donor_placeholder: Your name as it will appear in the donors list
payment.donor_info: This information will be shown in the donors list
payment.ref_reminder: When making the transfer, don't forget to write
payment.thank_desc: Your donation is very valuable for our school's students. Your support changes lives.
payment.whatsapp_notify: Please notify the school for quick matching of your donation:
payment.ref_desc: Write this code in the description field so your donation matches the right need
payment.security_info: Your payment is processed through a secure infrastructure. Your card information is not stored on our servers.
payment.email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address.
payment.phone_invalid: Please enter a valid phone number (05XX XXX XX XX).

contact.title: Contact
contact.meta_desc: Dumlupınar Primary School contact information and contact form.
contact.subtitle: Contact us for questions, suggestions, or information about donations.
contact.form_success_desc: We will get back to you as soon as possible. Thank you.

donors.title: Our Donors
donors.meta_desc: All donors who support Dumlupınar Primary School. Every donation is an investment in a child's future.
donors.subtitle: All the supporters of our school
donors.thank_message: Dear {{name}}, thank you very much for your contributions on behalf of our school. Your support helps our students receive a better education. Every donation is an investment in a child's future.

login.title: Admin Login - Dumlupınar Primary School
login.heading: School Admin Panel
login.subtitle: Log in for needs management
login.invalid: Invalid username or password ({{remaining}} attempts left)
login.service_unavailable: Login service is currently unavailable. Please try again later.

stories.title: Donation Stories
stories.subtitle: Stories of completed donations. Every donation makes a difference in a child's life.
stories.meta_desc: Dumlupınar Primary School donation stories. The impact of completed donations and student stories.
stories.empty: No stories have been shared yet.
stories.footer_cta_desc: Every donation creates a story. Support our school's needs and become part of these stories.
